I love this arcade! We’re from south Florida and always want to come up to Orlando just for this arcade.

The plushies are licensed and so high quality! We came twice on our latest trip. We spent $200 and won 6 Sonny’s and a bunch of cute keychain plushies! I think it is very well worth it for the time and entertainment we got while getting the prizes!!! Then to top it off, I pulled a Robby from the very last fruit in the Sonny machine! We’re up - thank you Lucas for your help!! Every time we’ve come here the staff has given us an extra play after a couple losses in a row and helped by positioning the prize or ping pong balls so we could grab it.

The very first time we came was pre tariffs and the payout felt 1:1 with wholesale prices which shocked us! The staff was awesome they always are! Even now post tariffs the payout feels 1:1 with retail /resell prices. Arcades are notoriously expensive for cheap prizes - this one is extremely fair in exchange for really good prizes so don’t let the negative reviews discourage you!!

A top‑tier arcade experience.
Mirai Arcade delivers an impressive mix of modern Japanese arcade titles, classic favorites, and unique machines you won’t find anywhere else. The environment is spotless, the machines run flawlessly, and the staff clearly cares about creating a great experience. The layout is comfortable, the lighting is stylish without being overwhelming, and the atmosphere is perfect for both casual players and serious gamers. Easily one of the best arcades I’ve visited.

No longer recommend this spot. Updating my previous positive review from early 2025—genuinely loved going to Mirai when they first opened was going EVERY weekend and taking friends and family constantly. Investing a lot of money and even getting a black card. Loved the welcoming atmosphere at first. Even participated and went to their events.

Started to gradually stop going more because  the cost of credits increased for the machines by A LOT and plus the staring and following was quite overwhelming especially from an anxious / shy person’s point of view. It didn’t help whenever we did pop in we were asked to write a review to gain a couple more tries on their machines.

We recently came in check and see how everything was going and saw a couple of keychains my friends and I were interested in on their social media account we follow. I was already feeling reluctant to go due to my recent experience but my friend encouraged me to try it out again one more time. So we went. First thing that occurred when we just walked in. Just walked in. Didn’t even get a chance to walk in and browse fully beside the Sonny’s at the literal register, we were asked to get our bags checked. Of course we’re not going to deny but it was quite disheartening and slightly baffling to experience, passing them our bags to get checked as soon as we had just entered the building. Especially because we were trying to give it another chance and haven’t been in so long. And it didn’t help that SOME employees seemed to be rounding every corner to either watch or lurk around like they already do after they legit just checked our bags. Some of the other employees there ARE very friendly in that establishment though, not all. In addition, checked the credits needed for the keychains and was astonished with how much they were pitched up to. This will be the last time I recommend anyone else there and personally going there myself.

I haven been coming to this claw machine for a long time even went to the grand opening for the store. Everytime i do go in the store i get the nastiest stares like i am doing something bad when i have spend so much money at the store. When the store first opened it was a great experience but for some reason months later everytime i go in just to look, i am getting stared at, and also being followed by multiple employees.  There is no reason to stare people down and make them feel uncomfortable to play the claw machine. Following people from every corner going to different rooms, whatever room i went to they followed me to that room. If you want to go to a claw machine kawaii is great and gatcha as well.

I love this arcade! We’re from south Florida and always want to come up to Orlando just for this arcade.

The plushies are licensed and so high quality! We came twice on our latest trip. We spent $200 and won 6 Sonny’s and a bunch of cute keychain plushies! I think it is very well worth it for the time and entertainment we got while getting the prizes!!! Then to top it off, I pulled a Robby from the very last fruit in the Sonny machine! We’re up - thank you Lucas for your help!! Every time we’ve come here the staff has given us an extra play after a couple losses in a row and helped by positioning the prize or ping pong balls so we could grab it.

The very first time we came was pre tariffs and the payout felt 1:1 with wholesale prices which shocked us! The staff was awesome they always are! Even now post tariffs the payout feels 1:1 with retail /resell prices. Arcades are notoriously expensive for cheap prizes - this one is extremely fair in exchange for really good prizes so don’t let the negative reviews discourage you!!
